description: A young woman stands on a rocky coastline, shielding her eyes from the sun with her hand. She is wearing a teal patterned dress and blue sneakers. Behind her, the deep blue sea churns with white waves crashing against the shore. The sky is a vibrant, cloudless blue. The rocks are uneven and textured, suggesting a natural, rugged environment. She appears happy and is looking towards the camera.
location_context: This image appears to be taken at a coastal area with rocky terrain, possibly a seaside cliff.
time_context: Daytime, likely midday given the bright sunlight and clear blue sky.
